notes.en: [[character:lan-yan]] supports her team through shields and grouping.
notes.fr: [[character:lan-yan]] soutient son équipe grâce aux boucliers et au grouping.
notes.it: [[character:lan-yan]] supporta il team creando scudi e raggruppando i nemici.

notes.en: [[character:lan-yan]]'s shield can undergo Elemental Absorption, meaning that her shield can absorb PHEC ([[element:pyro]]/[[element:hydro]]/[[element:electro]]/[[element:cryo]]) and become more resistant to the element it has absorbed.
notes.fr: Le bouclier de [[character:lan-yan]] peut subir une absorption élémentaire, ce qui signifie qu'il peut absorber les éléments PHEC ([[element:pyro]]/[[element:hydro]]/[[element:electro]]/[[element:cryo]]) et devenir plus résistant à l'élément absorbé.
notes.it: Lo scudo di [[character:lan-yan]] può assorbire PHEC ([[element:pyro]]/[[element:hydro]]/[[element:electro]]/[[element:cryo]]), rendendolo più resistente all'elemento che ha assorbito.

notes.en: [[character:lan-yan]] has to make contact with an enemy upon [[ability:skill]] cast for the absorption to take place.
notes.fr: [[character:lan-yan]] doit entrer en contact avec un ennemi lors du lancement de son [[ability:skill]] pour que l'absorption ait lieu.
notes.it: [[character:lan-yan]] deve entrare in contatto con un nemico durante l'[[ability:skill]] per assorbire un elemento.
